reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve and return the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents list including "QA-20260418-191939-t0pr" with status "idle"
Clicked on "QA-20260418-191939-t0pr" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, displaying agent name, status indicator, and message input field
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator showed "idle", which satisfies the requirement (running or idle)
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was typed into input field and sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response - Agent transitioned to "awaiting input" status after 3 seconds
GitHub account access request card appeared - Card displayed "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" with GitHub account already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access - Request processed successfully, agent resumed processing
Agent executed bash command "Fetch authenticated GitHub user" - Bash tool executed to retrieve user information
API request review card appeared asking to allow GitHub GET /user call - Permission dialog shown with "Allow Once" option
Clicked "Allow Once" button to permit the API call - API call executed successfully
Agent returned final response - Response message displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." (visible in screenshot)
Verified response includes GitHub username and took screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation flow with GitHub username "yiw190" clearly visible in agent response
